attachment.description: The GPX file itself as an attachment.

author.description: Author of the GPX file, if present in metadata.

creator.description: Creator software or device as declared in the gpx root element.

end-time.description: Latest timestamp observed among route or track points.

gpx-version.description: GPX format version declared in the gpx root element, for example 1.0 or 1.1.

keywords.description: Keywords present in the GPX metadata.

link.description: Associated link present in GPX metadata.

max-latitude.description: Maximum latitude of the GPX bounding box in WGS84.

max-longitude.description: Maximum longitude of the GPX bounding box in WGS84.

md5.description: MD5 hash of the GPX file.

mime-type.description: MIME type of the file, typically application/gpx+xml.

min-latitude.description: Minimum latitude of the GPX bounding box in WGS84.

min-longitude.description: Minimum longitude of the GPX bounding box in WGS84.

name.description: Name of the GPX dataset or activity.

point-count.description: Total number of geographic points contained in the GPX file.

route-count.description: Number of route elements in the GPX file.

sha1.description: SHA1 hash of the GPX file.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the GPX file.

size-in-bytes.description: Size of the GPX file in bytes.

start-time.description: Earliest timestamp observed among route or track points.

text.description: Free text comment or analyst note about the GPX file.

time.description: Timestamp associated with the GPX metadata or activity.

track-count.description: Number of track elements in the GPX file.

track-segment-count.description: Number of track segment elements in the GPX file.

waypoint-count.description: Number of waypoint elements in the GPX file.

description: An object to describe a GPX (GPS Exchange Format) file, including file metadata, GPX metadata, spatial bounds, and counts of waypoints, routes, and tracks.
name: gpx
